name: io.github.kagan-sh/kagan
title: Kagan
description: AI-powered Kanban TUI for autonomous development workflows with agent orchestration

environmentVariables.name: KAGAN_OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for agent execution (if using OpenAI backend)

environmentVariables.name: KAGAN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for agent execution (if using Claude backend)

environmentVariables.name: KAGAN_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Custom path for Kagan database file
